name: maquibot-backend
description: Backend modular monolith for MaquiBot WhatsApp lead conversion

scripts.dev:clean: bash -lc 'for i in 1 2 3 4 5; do pids=$(lsof -ti:3000 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$pids" ]; then break; fi; kill $pids 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 0.2; done; pids=$(lsof -ti:3000 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pids" ]; then kill -9 $pids 2>/dev/null || true; fi; nodemon src/server.js'
